summary: Daily Summary + Fase 3 MCP Agents testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend regression tests passed. Email sent to ramirez91@gmail.com (correct recipient). Both new agents (gestor_siniestros, triador_averias) registered with correct tools and rate limits (120/600).
critical_code_review_comments: daily_summary.py correctly sends to LOGISTICA_DAILY_EMAIL (default ramirez91@gmail.com), NOT master@revix.es
Idempotency via mcp_daily_runs collection works correctly (already_sent_today)
Scheduler starts on backend startup with 10-min check interval
Scheduler stops correctly on shutdown (no memory leaks)
gestor_siniestros has 8 tools: listar_peticiones_pendientes, crear_orden_desde_peticion, actualizar_portal_insurama, subir_evidencias, cerrar_siniestro, buscar_orden, buscar_cliente, ping
triador_averias has 6 tools: proponer_diagnostico, sugerir_repuestos, recomendar_tecnico, buscar_orden, consultar_inventario, ping
Rate limits seeded correctly: 120 soft / 600 hard for both new agents
Agent chat works with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - proponer_diagnostico and listar_peticiones_pendientes tools execute correctly
seed_data_creation: Rate limits seeded for gestor_siniestros and triador_averias on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily summary endpoint at /api/logistica/panel/enviar-resumen-diario works. force=true sends email, force=false checks idempotency. 7 agents total in /api/agents (excluding seguimiento_publico which is public). Rate limits at /api/agents/rate-limits. Agent chat at /api/agents/{agent_id}/chat returns 'reply' field (not 'response' or 'message'). MCP_ENV=preview means Insurama portal updates are MOCKED.

mocked_apis_list: Insurama portal (mock en MCP_ENV=preview - actualizar_portal_insurama returns preview:true)
Resend email API sends real emails when RESEND_API_KEY configured

tests: Returns sent:true, to:ramirez91@gmail.com, date, summary with envios_activos/incidencias_24h/entregas_ayer
Returns 7 agents including gestor_siniestros and triador_averias
Has 8 tools including listar_peticiones_pendientes, crear_orden_desde_peticion, actualizar_portal_insurama, subir_evidencias, cerrar_siniestro
Has 6 tools including proponer_diagnostico, sugerir_repuestos, recomendar_tecnico
Daily summary scheduler started (logs show 'Daily summary scheduler arrancado')
